email: Hi, I was charged twice for my monthly subscription. Can you refund one of the charges?
expected_summary: Customer requests a refund for a duplicate subscription charge.

email: I cancelled my subscription last week but my credit card was charged today.
expected_summary: Customer was charged after cancelling the subscription.

email: Can you send me a copy of my latest invoice?
expected_summary: Customer requests the latest invoice.

email: My payment keeps failing even though my card is valid.
expected_summary: Customer reports repeated payment failures.

email: Amazing! Another payment deducted from my account. Great service.
expected_summary: Customer sarcastically complains about another unexpected charge.

email: The app crashes every time I try to upload a document.
expected_summary: Customer reports the app crashing during document upload.

email: The website shows a 500 Internal Server Error whenever I log in.
expected_summary: Customer encounters a server error while logging in.

email: Videos are buffering continuously even though my internet connection is fine.
expected_summary: Customer experiences continuous video buffering.

email: I never receive the OTP required to verify my account.
expected_summary: Customer is not receiving OTP verification codes.

email: helo app not wrking plz fix asap
expected_summary: Customer reports the application is not working.

email: I forgot my password and cannot access my account.
expected_summary: Customer cannot access the account due to a forgotten password.

email: My account has been locked after multiple login attempts.
expected_summary: Customer requests help unlocking the account.

email: I want to change the email address linked to my account.
expected_summary: Customer wants to update the registered email address.

email: Please permanently delete my account and all associated data.
expected_summary: Customer requests permanent account deletion.

email: Mera account login nahi ho raha. Please help.
expected_summary: Customer cannot log into the account.

email: Do you offer discounts for university students?
expected_summary: Customer asks about student discounts.

email: I'd like to suggest adding dark mode to your application.
expected_summary: Customer submits a feature request for dark mode.

email: Can you tell me your business hours and support availability?
expected_summary: Customer asks about support availability.

email: Your platform has been extremely helpful. Thank you for the excellent service!
expected_summary: Customer shares positive feedback about the service.

email: I can't log in, and I was charged twice yesterday.
expected_summary: Customer reports login issues and a duplicate charge.
notes: Multi-intent email. Account is treated as the primary category for this benchmark.

email: I received an invoice for a service I never purchased.
expected_summary: Customer disputes an unexpected invoice.

email: The application freezes every time I try to export a report.
expected_summary: Customer reports the application freezing during report export.

email: I accidentally created two accounts. Can they be merged?
expected_summary: Customer requests merging duplicate accounts.

email: Does your platform support integration with Google Drive?
expected_summary: Customer asks about Google Drive integration.
